target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Catastrophic structural deformation; major components blown off and scattered; no discernible operational capability.

summary: Two military vehicles are present, both assessed as DESTROYED with CONFIRMED confidence. The scene depicts two heavily damaged armored vehicles on a road, with one showing catastrophic structural deformation and the other displaying mangled chassis and scattered debris. The likely functional impact is complete loss of operational capability for both vehicles, consistent with K-kill assessments.
